rationale: The citing paper references Fader, Hardie, and Lee (2005) only as one item in a grouped citation supporting the general claim that recency and frequency are established predictors in customer base analysis. The paper does not discuss that article's specific RFM-to-CLV model, iso-value curves, or empirical findings in any distinct way. There is no direct method reuse, extension, or explicit theoretical dependence on this specific paper beyond broad background positioning.
